projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Import GitHub repos so the matcher can rank them against any JD.
projects.importDesc: Enter a GitHub username to quickly import public repos. Link GitHub for private repos.
projects.browseByUrl: Or paste a repo URL directly

match.title: Match
match.subtitle: Paste a job description; we'll rank your projects against it.

interview.title: Interview
interview.subtitle: Practice with an AI interviewer that adapts to your projects and target role.
interview.targetedDesc: Select specific projects to deep-dive on, with a required JD.
interview.comprehensiveDesc: Cover your full portfolio — technical breadth, project narrative, growth trajectory.
interview.jdOptionalHint: If provided, questions will focus on the target role.
interview.allProjectsIncluded: All your imported projects will be covered.
interview.noProjects: Import projects first before starting an interview.

repoBrowser.title: Browse your GitHub repos
repoBrowser.desc: Select repos to import. Each will be analyzed for skills.

quiz.title: Knowledge Quiz
quiz.subtitle: AI engineering interview question bank — pick a category, answer, get instant scoring.

landing.heroSub: Match your projects to job descriptions, practice interviews with AI feedback, and generate tailored resume bullets.
landing.feature1Desc: Paste any JD and instantly see which of your projects best demonstrate the required skills.
landing.feature2Desc: Practice with an AI interviewer that adapts questions based on your project and the target role.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate STAR-format resume bullets tailored to specific job descriptions.
